briefing.title: Morning Briefing
briefing.message: Morning mate. Note: live Garmin data couldn't be pulled today — VPS host key changed (needs fixing). Working from data last synced 2026-03-19. Last known TSB was -3.6 (normal), resting HR 55bpm (good — right at baseline). Last gym session was Upper 1 on Mar 16, so you're well overdue a Push Day to kick off the week. With nearly 2 weeks since the last logged session, start conservatively — RPE 7 max on compounds, don't chase old weights. Today's a Monday so it's a solid day to reset the week with a proper Push session. Keep sodium under 2g today and hydrate well — 2.5L minimum.

todayWorkout.name: Push Day
todayWorkout.exercises: Flat Bench Press 4x6-8, Overhead Press 4x6-8, Lateral Raises 3x12-15, Tricep Pushdowns 3x10-12, Cable Flyes 3x12
todayWorkout.prehab: Standing calf raises 3x15, eccentric single-leg calf lower 3x10 each, band pull-aparts 3x15, shoulder external rotations 3x15
todayWorkout.note: First session back after a gap — start at 90% of last working weight, focus on form. Increase if RPE ≤7 at the end of the session, not before.

recovery.label: Fresh
recovery.message: Last known TSB was -3.6 (2026-03-18) — with nearly 2 weeks since last sync, form is likely neutral or positive. Resting HR 55bpm was at baseline. No data since Mar 19 — treat today as a fresh start.

alerts.message: VPS SSH host key changed — live Garmin sync is blocked. Verify this is expected (server rebuild) before reconnecting. Check known_hosts and confirm with VPS provider if unsure.
Data is 12 days stale (last sync: 2026-03-19). Garmin metrics shown are estimates — fix SSH to resume live tracking.

insights.label: Steps
insights.text: Last 14-day average (to Mar 19) was ~5,000 steps/day — below the 8k+ target. Daily walks are one of the most impactful things for BP reduction. Try to stack 8k+ today.

insights.label: Sleep
insights.text: Recent sleep averaging ~7.5h but quality has been mostly Poor/Fair. You're getting the hours but not the depth — try cutting screens 30 min before bed and keeping a consistent wake time.

insights.label: Training
insights.text: Last gym session was 15 days ago (Mar 16). Getting back to 3 sessions/week this week will help both body composition and BP. Push today, Pull mid-week, optional mobility at the weekend.

insights.label: BP Target
insights.text: Resting HR 55bpm is solid. BP target is <135/85 — daily walks + 3x/week resistance training + sodium <2g are the three biggest levers. Stay consistent this week.
